titleStmt.title: SII 41.116: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 116. (A.R. No. 115 of 1905.) Tiruvālīśvaram, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vālīśvara temple at Tiruvālīśvaram.

summary.p: Contains two sections. The first mentions a gift of cows for a perpetual lamp by the sabhā of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Muḷḷi-nāḍu. The second one mentions the decision of the same sabhā that no tax should be collected from the cultivators of the flower garden called Rājēndrachōḻaṉ attached to the temple of Tiruvāliśvaram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭaiya paṉmarāyiṉ śrīcun=taracoḻa pāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu rāja
rājap pāṇṭiṉāṭṭu muṭikoṇṭacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu muḷḷiṉāṭṭu brahmatēyam śrīrājarājac caṟuppeti
maṅkalattu tiruvāliccaramuṭaiyārkku muṉ mahāsabhaiyār vaicca tirunun=tāviḷakku Oṉṟu
Iṭaiyaṉ kāricen=taṉ (v)aicam kuṭutta cāvāmūvā pacu 2 10 5 Irupattañcāl Aṭṭa kaṭava
ney Uḻakku (1/2) ney Uḻakku(m)maṭṭuvatāka
Ik koyil tevarkku muṉmel piṭākai merūr Irukkum veḷḷāḷaṉ ce
vaṉ brahmakuṭṭaṉ vaicca tirunon=tāviḷakku Oṉṟu Iṭaiyaṉ Añcikāri caṇaṉ Aṭṭa
kaṭava ney Uḻakkiṉukku koṇṭa Erumai 3 10 4 Ivaṉukku puṇai taṉiyāṉ kaṭṭāṇai
y Ikkoyil tevarkkum yivvūrukkum yiṭaiyaṉ kākuttaṉ karumāṇikka
viḷakku Arai viḷakkiṉukkum Erikka koṇṭa cāvāmūvā perāṭu 2 10 5 Appi cūṟṟikku puṇai Oḷi
taṉ kaḷakkuṭi śrīrājarājac carupetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ōlai nam karaṇattārkaḷum nampiṭā
kai Uḻukkuṭikaḷum kaṇṭu namakku tiruvāli[ śvara] muṭaiyār tirunan=tavāṉam Irājentracoḻaṉ
ceykiṉṟār Uḻuta nilam Iṟai(y) koḷḷātoḻivārākavum Ivaṉaiyum Ivaṉ maka naṭattaiyu
kāṭṭappaṇikkap paṇiccukkarai Iṭṭuk karai pon=taceri 3ceri cerntu A[ ṉan=ta] pura
Digital edition of SII 41.116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
